title: Tree Miner
description: This is a MinecraftMOD that uses trees to produce minerals
body:
A practical MOD developed by CTN Studio (China team)                            

To use this mod you need to download the 1.0.0 version of the attachment or the 1.0.0 version of the API repository[API repository link](https://github.com/Wang-Xiao-Jing/XiaoJinAPI)

## How to play?
This MOD adds tree forms to all minerals from the original, you can collect raw ore and add oak saplings to synthesize lode saplings.                                          

![Synthesis of lode saplings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e307c68a62b70d219439f879596f6bbff2f1fdba.png)

Lode saplings need to be planted on the corresponding ore, and since the trees are relatively large, please give some space.

![put](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/639d2d5a2e67b38fcf9ad91bd50e8359a6a21fb0_0.webp)

After the saplings are mature, you can right-click the mature leaves to obtain the corresponding ore fruit, which can be smelted and smoked, smelted to obtain the corresponding mineral product, and smoked to obtain the corresponding ripe ore fruit.

![Firing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8e9c7906121c5f36cd709ea290ac439bc34533.png)
![Smoking and blast furnace firing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48c7dda3663ec012f14acda907978911d449634e.png)

You can eat these ripe ore fruit can give you some beneficial effects, you can also make the trunk of the tree into the corresponding boards to make special bowls.

Any number of ripe fruits can be combined with special bowls to make special foods (note: ripe fruits are not repeatable), which are not stackable but are ready to eat and will have the effect of synthetic ripe fruits.
![Special food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/625049dfc0230d21411e0bb647e0244bf9861971.png)

There are more features for you to find

This is my (the main developer) first MOD so there will be a lot of questions to point out Thank you!
